name: python3-freezegun
title: python3-freezegun
summary: Python3 library to mock the datetime module in unit testing
description:
Python3 library to mock the datetime module in unit testing
FreezeGun allows easy mocking of the datetime module by freezing the return
value of the methods datetime.datetime.now(), datetime.datetime.utcnow(),
datetime.date.today(), and time.time() to a fixed point in time. Use it
in unit testing to make the tests deterministic and time-independent.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-freezegun because Python3 library to mock the datetime module in unit testing.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-freezegun as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-freezegun with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-freezegun --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
